Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Asian-American communities who value Morning Glory, a highly invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp? Emeril presents two delicious recipes.
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice cook or an advanced chef, you'll love these recipes: vegetable soup, and roast chicken served with roasted root vegetables
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: It's a pizza party! Emeril will how you how to make basic dough. Plus, Emeril shares his recipes for the ultimate mushroom and Manchego pizza and classic pizza margherita
Video.title: Making Pizza at Home

Video.summary: Emeril shows a group of bachelors how to impress with a classic and affordable French dinner: sauteed chicken cutlets with Dijon-tarragon sauce, braised carrots, and pommes Lyonnaise
Video.title: Frugal French

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril's brunch will feed a bunch! Cheesy country ham omelet, followed by warm popovers with creamy Creole shrimp, Prosecco and orange sorbet with Cointreau cocktail
Video.title: Come on Over for Brunch

Video.summary: Emeril shares the virtues of southern caviar, proving it can be both accessible and sustainable: Emeril's Grilled Shrimp with Caviar Butter.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril spotlights Louisiana hot sauce and turns up the heat on Piri Piri Shrimp and Wings with Pimenta Moida Sauce.
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost to time until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Emeril prepares satisfying soups: Cuban black bean soup, tortilla soup, and French onion soup topped with bubbling Gruyere cheese
Video.title: International Soups

Video.summary: Root for your home team with Emeril's sports party favorites: French dip sandwich, tuna poker chips, and the ultimate cheese dip - cheesy beer!
Video.title: Sports Party

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: Harvest Salad of Bitter Greens, Pears and Blue Cheese; Pork Tenderloin Stuffed with Prosciutto and Dried Fruit with Port Wine Sauce; Poached Apples with Sabayon
Video.title: Chill in the Air

Video.summary: Farmer's Market Salad with Goat Cheese Croutons, Baked Sea Trout with Market Vegetables and Potatoes, Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie with Almond Crumb Topping
Video.title: Emeril's Farmers Market

Video.summary: Lobster, Shrimp and Stone Crab Creole; Black Bean Soup with Ham Hock Dumplings; Latin Country-Style Meat Stew
Video.title: Stews, Latin Style

Video.summary: Parmesan and Gruyere Cheese Sticks; Heirloom Tomato, Goat Cheese and Roasted Garlic Galette; Pork Tenderloin en Croute; Kicked-Up Chocolate Beggar's Purse
Video.title: Puff Pastry

Video.summary: Crab Meat Asparagus Salad, Roasted Chicken with Lemon Herb Sauce, Vanilla Creme Brulee
Video.title: The Art of Plating

Video.summary: A classic favorite gets a makeover: Eggplant Parmesan Lasagna; Mexican Enchilada Suiza Lasagna; Asian Crispy Wonton Lasagna; Mediterranean Matzo Lasagna
Video.title: Creative Lasagna

Video.summary: Emeril prepares "kicked-up" sandwiches with the Radio City Rockettes: spicy eggplant with mozzarella and basil, porchetta with dandelion greens, and Elvis Presley-inspired peanut butter and banana
Video.title: Kicked-Up Sandwiches

Video.summary: What can you cook when there's nothing in the pantry? Emeril shares recipes that require minimal ingredients: vegetable frittata, easy fettuccine with bacon and peas, and roasted garlic soup.
Video.title: What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry

Image.alt: What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry
What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry
What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry

Video.summary: Emeril prepares healthy kids' meals: baked chicken fingers with creamy dreamy dipping sauce, edamame with sesame oil, and hot and hearty minestrone soup. Both kids and parents will love these dishes!
Video.title: Healthy Kids' Meals

Video.summary: Make delicious Asian dishes with Emeril's recipes: chicken and veggie stir-fry with cellophane noodles, beef and soba noodle stir-fry, and cold-noodle salad with honey-sesame dressing and peanuts
Video.title: Asian Noodles

Video.summary: You don't have to sacrifice taste when eating light! Emeril prepares cod in miso broth with enoki mushrooms, edamame, and pea sprouts, and Thai-style beef salad with cabbages and julienned carrots
Video.title: Light and Easy Does It

Video.summary: With the help of Fleisher's Grass-Fed and Organic Meats butchers, Emeril prepares seared tri-tip steak with bearnaise sauce and grilled flat-iron steak with avocado, tomato, and red onion salad
Video.title: Butchers' Favorite Cuts

Video.summary: Emeril has recipes for easy entertaining! Smoked-salmon spread in cucumber cups, spring rolls, pistachio and goat cheese-stuffed figs, and marinated blue crab claws
Video.title: Quick and Easy Hors d'oeuvres

Video.summary: Emeril will how you how to create authentic Mexican flavors: chicken and green chile tamales with roasted tomato salsa and tres leches cake
Video.title: Tamales

Video.summary: Leg of Lamb Stuffed with Goat Cheese and Spinach Stuffing, Lamb Kabobs
Video.title: Lamb

Video.summary: Stack Salad of Creole Tomatoes, Onions, Roquefort Cheese with Balsamic Syrup Drizzle; Zucchini and Shrimp Fritters; Eggplant and Shrimp Bake
Video.title: Summer Harvest

Video.summary: Collard and Mustard Greens in Ham Hock Gravy; Homemade Gratons (Cracklings); Smothered Pork Chops
Video.title: Cooking with Pork

Video.summary: Southwestern Corn Dressing, Fried Eggplant Salad, Rustic Scallops
Video.title: Essence

Video.summary: Grilled Citrus and Herb Extra-Jumbo Shrimp; Red Onion Couscous; Grilled Butterflied Leg of Lamb; Romaine, Feta, and Lemon Vinaigrette
Video.title: Grilling
